Ultimately, therapy isn’t a one-size-fits-all solution. It involves exploring different techniques to discover what resonates with you most deeply. What's important is that therapy provides a structured environment where you can acknowledge your pain, explore its impacts, and gradually learn strategies that allow for healing and artistic renewal.
